Off Calendar Mar-02-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ACCESS INSURANCE COMPANY, ACCESS GENERAL INSURANCE ADJUSTERS, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Access Ins. Co's anti-SLAPP motion to strike is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal filed February 1, 2018. This ruling is without prejudice to Access Ins. Co. filing a motion to recover fees and costs per CCP 425.16(c)(1).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
